title: Spiced Norwegian Beef Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with tender Norwegian beef, aromatic spices, and a hint of galangal.

ingredients.name: Galangal
ingredients.notes: Peel and slice into thin rounds

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the beef from the pot and set aside.
Add the galangal and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the onion and carrots and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the potatoes, red wine, beef broth, and spiced beef broth mix.
Return the beef to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, until the beef is tender, about 2 hours.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
